post_study_work_visa.name: Job Seeker Visa (§20 AufenthG)
post_study_work_visa.restrictions: Must find employment matching qualification level. No employer sponsorship required during search period.

top_schools.name: WHU Otto Beisheim School of Management

language_requirement: Programs taught in English. German proficiency (B1+) significantly improves job prospects.
scholarship_availability: Moderate — DAAD scholarships for international students. Some public universities offer low or no tuition. ESMT offers merit scholarships.
path_to_pr: EU Blue Card → settlement permit after 21 months (with B1 German) or 33 months. One of the fastest PR paths in Europe.
test_policy: GMAT or GRE accepted. Some schools accept TAGE MAGE or their own admissions tests.
